objective: Remove avoidable request-time public media asset lookups without cache while preserving realistic load-test semantics.
changed: Added stored public media URL fields to Work and Blog entities.
Added EF model defaults and required contract coverage.
Added relational schema patch and backfill from existing asset references.
Populated stored URLs in Work create/update, seed/bootstrap, and Notion import paths.
Refactored public Work, Blog, and Home query stores to project stored URLs directly.
Added behavior-focused component and integration coverage.
not_changed: No server-side response or output cache was added.
No seed-priority target selection was added.
Public list pageSize=12 behavior was preserved.
Blog admin cover asset API shape was not expanded.
risks: Stored URL fields can become stale if asset public URLs become mutable.
Local smoke uses seeded local data and is not a substitute for production Real Backend Test.
Backend Alpine logs still show a missing libgssapi_krb5.so.2 warning unrelated to this slice.
recommendation: Promote through dev/main CI, then rerun Real Backend Test on production-like host with realistic targets and pageSize=12.
